title: no berry damage
description: This lightweight mod completely prevents all damage from sweet berry bushes while preserving normal gameplay. Walk through berry patches with confidence and harvest berries without getting hurt.
body:
Say goodbye to annoying sweet berry bush damage!

This lightweight mod completely prevents all damage from sweet berry bushes while preserving normal gameplay. Walk through berry patches with confidence and harvest berries without getting hurt.

Key Features:

  • Zero damage from sweet berry bushes
  • Multiple detection strategies ensure complete protection
  • Works on both client and server
  • Lightweight with minimal performance impact
  • Berry harvesting remains unchanged - only damage is prevented

Perfect for players who love exploring but hate the constant prick of berry bushes! Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.8. Walk through those berry bushes with confidence!
